remember: List and define different measures of dispersion
Recall the formulas for calculating range, variance, and standard deviation
Explain the concept of dispersion and its importance in statistics
understand: Explain the difference between range and interquartile range (IQR)
Describe the steps involved in calculating variance and standard deviation
Understand the relationship between variance and standard deviation
apply: Calculate range, variance, and standard deviation from a given dataset
Apply the concept of dispersion to real-life scenarios
Use measures of dispersion to compare two or more datasets
analyze: Analyze a dataset to identify patterns and trends using measures of dispersion
Compare the dispersion of two or more datasets and draw conclusions
Use measures of dispersion to identify outliers and anomalies in a dataset

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of dispersion and its importance in statistics
To calculate and interpret different measures of dispersion such as range, variance, and standard deviation
To apply the concept of dispersion to real-life scenarios
board_exam_objectives: Define and calculate range, variance, and standard deviation from a given dataset
Explain the importance of measures of dispersion in statistics and their application in real-life scenarios
